cards.title: Confirmed Ticket
cards.mainText: It is the physical ticket that has a travel date, departure time, and seat number.
cards.secondaryText: This type of ticket is issued at:
items: Direct and Affiliated Points of Sale

cards.title: Connection Ticket
cards.mainText: You can request your reservation by phone at our Contact Center.
cards.secondaryText: This type of ticket is issued at:
items: Direct and Affiliated Points of Sale

cards.title: Open Ticket
cards.mainText: You can request your reservation by phone at our Contact Center.
cards.secondaryText: This type of ticket is issued at:
items: Direct and Affiliated Home Delivery Service Points

cards.title: Electronic Confirmed Ticket
cards.mainText: It is the non-printed ticket that has a travel date, departure time, and seat number. The printing of this ticket must be requested at the ticket booths one hour before departure, presenting an official ID, Operation number, and NIT.
cards.secondaryText: This type of ticket is issued at:
items: Direct and Affiliated Points of Sale

cards.title: Electronic Open Ticket
cards.mainText: It is the non-printed ticket that only indicates origin and destination; at the time of purchase, you are provided with the Operation number and NIT. It is subject to seat availability and bus discounts. The printing of this ticket must be requested at the ticket booths one hour before departure, presenting an official ID, Operation number, and NIT. You can request your reservation by phone at our Contact Center.
cards.secondaryText: This type of ticket is issued at:
items: Direct and Affiliated Points of Sale
